channel.title: Final Fantasy XVI on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Final Fantasy XVI on Chasing Dings!

item.title: Is Final Fantasy XVI worth playing?
item.description: This isn’t my first Final Fantasy game by a long shot. But, it’s probably the first one I sat down and completed without getting distracted by any other game since… of the mainline games… Final Fantasy VIII. It’s been a long time since I gave a Final Fantasy game complete control over my free time. Now I’m at the other end of it, I’ve had a couple days to think it over.
